overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a character in ancient Greek attire exploring a sunlit ancient shipyard. The character climbs a wooden post, walks through narrow stone passages and open construction areas with wooden scaffolding and partially built ships, traverses an indoor workshop, and emerges into a courtyard with snow-capped mountains visible in the distance.

events.description: character climbs up wooden post and pulls themselves onto a platform
character drops down from platform and begins walking forward through construction area

agents.ego_description: character climbs a wooden post, pulls up onto a platform, then drops down and walks through a construction area with stacked lumber and stone walls

entered.detail: tall wooden post with notches used for climbing
ancient weathered stone block wall with rough texture
piles of wooden planks and beams stacked against the wall
wooden support structure for ship construction

segments.scene_description: In a shaded construction area, the character interacts with a wooden climbing post, ascends and descends it, then walks forward through a narrow passage lined with stacked lumber and stone walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between stone warehouses opening to shipyard

events.description: exits narrow covered passage into open shipyard area with bright sunlight
full sunlight illuminates the scene as character emerges from shadows into the open yard

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily through a narrow stone passage with red banners, emerging into a sunlit open shipyard area

notable_agents.action: civilian in red tunic walking along the warehouse wall

entered.detail: large red fabric banner hanging from wooden scaffolding
whitewashed wooden building with shuttered windows and timber framing
snow-capped mountain visible in the distance against blue sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow alley with stone walls and red banners, emerging from shade into bright sunlight. A wooden warehouse lines the right side while snow-capped mountains become visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air shipyard with vessel under construction

events.description: character turns slightly left to navigate around construction materials and workers

agents.ego_description: character walks through the busy shipyard, passing workers and navigating around construction debris, ship hulls, and market stalls

notable_agents.action: worker in white tunic standing near a wooden cart
child running across the dirt path

entered.detail: large wooden ship under construction supported by wooden beams and scaffolding
fabric awning providing shade over a work area with tables underneath
temporary wooden barrier surrounding the construction zone

segments.scene_description: The character explores a wide-open shipyard bustling with activity, walking past a large wooden vessel under construction and market stalls with fabric canopies. Workers and children move about the dusty yard as the camera navigates around debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone workshop interior with storage and timber supports

events.description: character enters dark stone building from bright outdoors, lighting changes dramatically
character exits building into sunlit courtyard with construction materials visible

agents.ego_description: character enters a dimly lit stone workshop, walks through the interior passing storage materials and wooden columns, and exits to a sunlit courtyard

notable_agents.action: worker carrying materials near the building exit

entered.detail: large stone entrance leading into the workshop building
thick wooden support beams holding up the roof structure inside
burlap sacks stacked against the interior walls
two-wheeled wooden cart loaded with construction goods

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dimly lit stone workshop, transitioning from bright sunlight to shadowy interior with stone floors and wooden columns. After passing storage sacks and a wooden cart, the character exits back into sunlight to a courtyard area.

scene_state.functional_zone: shipyard courtyard with scaffolding and stone fortifications

events.description: character turns right to follow the path along the stone wall corner

agents.ego_description: character walks through the sunlit courtyard, passing a wooden cart and turning right along tall stone walls with construction scaffolding

notable_agents.action: worker in yellow tunic walking ahead on the dirt path

entered.detail: tall wooden scaffolding structure against the stone wall
high stone fortification wall with weathered blocks

segments.scene_description: Emerging into a bright courtyard, the character walks past a wooden cart and turns right along a tall stone wall lined with construction scaffolding. A worker in a yellow tunic walks ahead on the dirt path as the character continues through the shipyard.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a shaded construction zone that gradually opens into a bustling, sun-drenched ancient shipyard. It begins in a dim area where the character climbs a wooden post before navigating a narrow passage lined with stacked lumber and stone walls. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts from the shade of a red-bannered alley into bright sunlight, revealing a wide-open yard filled with market stalls, workers, and a massive wooden vessel under construction against a backdrop of snow-capped mountains. The camera then transitions into the cool shadows of a dimly lit stone workshop, passing wooden columns and storage sacks before emerging once more into the glare of a bright courtyard. Finally, the movement continues along a tall stone wall draped in scaffolding, following a worker in a yellow tunic across the dusty terrain of the shipyard.
